productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Soft Striped White Flip Flops
description: Colourful striped flip flops for women from adidas. Printed design on the insole is inspired by the classic stripe obsession that took over the fashion world. Pair them with similar toned tees and fitted denims or shorts. Upper Rubber thong straps with the adidas patented 3-Stripes Rubber toe separator Adidas patented 3-Stripes on the axis of the Flip Flops PU footbed with print for all-day massage feel with printed branding Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
